name: Mexicali Spoon Bread Casserole Xfvf35a
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Cook and stir meat, onion, green pepper, and garlic in a large skillet until the onion is tender and the meat is browned. Drain off excess fat.
3. Stir in tomato sauce, corn (undrained), salt (1 1/2 tsp), chili powder, black pepper, and olives. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer while preparing the cornmeal topping.
4. Mix milk, cornmeal, and salt in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat until boiling. Remove from heat and stir in cheese and beaten eggs.
5. Pour hot meat mixture into an ungreased 2 1/2 to 3-quart casserole.
6. Immediately pour the cornmeal topping onto the meat mixture.
7. Bake, uncovered, until a knife inserted in the topping comes out clean (about 40 minutes). Serve hot.
